info.title: WhatsApp Service
info.description:
WhatsApp Service

 **Last update**: 17 nov 25, 07:20 p. m.

put.description:
Update a Template

**It is only possible to modify templates that are related to an Auronix account**

requestBody.description:
A Template for update

> No field is required, but at least one must be set.

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the item

AccountFilters.name: filters
AccountFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

MessageFilters.name: filters
MessageFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

PhoneListAccountData.name: accountData
PhoneListAccountData.description: Indicates if more information about account needs to be added.

PhoneFilters.name: filters
PhoneFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

TemplateFilters.name: filters
TemplateFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

accessToken.description: A token that identifies a account and can be used to make API calls

accountId.description: The related Account ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Account** Entity. See [Account](/v2/service/conversation-whatsapp#tag/Account)

integrationId.description: The unique identifier in WhatsApp integration

integrationName.description: The type of integration with WhatsApp of the account

phoneId.description: The Phone Id of the template. This refer to the `id` of the **Phone** Entity of **Janis Conversation-Whatsapp Service**. See [Phone](v2/service/conversation-whatsapp#tag/Phone)

parameters.description: The parameters that the text has

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

dateCreatedRange.description: The day of creation by date range

dateModifiedRange.description: The day of last modification by date range

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

publishTemplate.description: Determines whether account templates should be published

conversationId.description: The related Conversation Message ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Message** Entity. See [Message](/v2/service/conversation#tag/Message)

templateId.description: The related Conversation Whatsapp Template ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Template** Entity. See [Template](/v2/service/conversation-whatsapp#tag/Template)

data.description: The information which will be used to replace in the message

error.description: Error message that provides additional information about the failure or exception occurred
error.example: Request to the Meta API failed

useInternalTemplate.description: Indicates if the message was created using an internal template. If true, some fields will not be returned in the response

accountName.description:
The name of the account. This refer to the `name` of the [Account](/v2/service/conversation-whatsapp#tag/Account) Entity.

**Important**: This field is only available when the `accountData` parameter is send as `true`

accountIntegrationName.description:
The integration name of the account. This refer to the `integrationName` of the [Account](/v2/service/conversation-whatsapp#tag/Account) Entity.

**Important**: This field is only available when the `accountData` parameter is send as `true`

prefix.description: The international phone code for country

sampleData.description: The information which will be used to replace in the body of the template

status.description: The status of the template's publication

startDate.description: Start date of the template publication

endDate.description: End date of the template publication

errorMessage.description: The reason for the publication failure
errorMessage.example: Meta could not update the template

integrationStatus.description: The status of the template in the integration

integrationResponse.description: The response to the publication request

language.description: The language code of the template

id.description: The related Conversation Template ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Template** Entity. See [Template](/v2/service/conversation#tag/Template)

body.example: We are happy to welcome you in {{group}}!

footer.example: This is a message from JANIS

phoneId.description: The related Phone ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Phone** Entity. See [Template](/v2/service/conversation-whatsapp#tag/Phone)
